label: TRUE

claim: Bharat mein, lagbhag 1650 crore vehicles highway tolls ka use kar rahe hain, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MoRTH) ke anusaar, March 2017 tak Bharat mein registered motor vehicles ki kul sankhya lagbhag 25 crores thi, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government ne kaha ki optimal utilisation ke liye, Ministry of Power ne suggest kiya hai ki air conditioners ko 26 degrees Celsius se upar use karna chahiye, energy conservation aur health reasons ke liye. Lekin fact yeh hai ki Central government ne Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) ke saath consultation karke new energy performance standards notify kiye hain Room Air Conditioner ke liye, jiske according sabhi brands aur types ke star-labelled RACs, jo one star se five stars tak rated hote hain unki energy efficiencies ke basis par, default setting of temperature room air conditioners mein 24 degrees Celsius par set karni chahiye, January 1, 2020 se.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Ye video dikhata hai ki Mulayam Singh Yadav Parliament mein anti-Hindu statements kar rahe hain. Sachchai yeh hai ki ye viral video edited hai aur context se bahar present kiya gaya hai. Ye video 12th Lok Sabha ke first session ka hai, jo 27 March 1998 ko hua tha, jab Atal Bihari Vajpayee ne Council of Ministers par House ki confidence ko express karne ke liye ek motion move kiya tha. Is clip mein Mulayam Singh Yadav, Uttar Pradesh mein BJP ke anti-copying law ki aalochana kar rahe hain, students ki jail ki opposite kar rahe hain, aur apne virodhiyon par cabinet mein criminals ko ministers banane ka aarop lagate hain. Unhone yeh bhi jawab diya ki unki party ko dushman ke roop mein label kiya ja raha hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: State Government ne domestic LPG cylinders par 55% tax lagu kiya hai, jabki Central Government ka tax sirf 5% hai: Fact yeh hai ki domestic LPG cylinders 5% GST (CGST - 2.5% + SGST - 2.5%) slab mein aate hain. Central aur State governments apne alag-alag separate taxes LPG cylinders par nahi lagti. Is claim ki koi basis nahi hai ki State government LPG cylinders par 55% tax lagti hai. Post mein di gayi dealer's commission ke numbers bhi sahi nahi hain. Dealer/distributor ka commission ek 14.2 kg LPG gas cylinder par Rs. 61.84 hota hai. Isliye yeh claim galat hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Ek flight attendant ki visuals hai, jo aisle mein girne ke baad embarrassed ho gayi thi, jab woh pilot ki cockpit microphone band karne ki koshish kar rahi thi. Sachchai yeh hai ki ye visuals do alag-alag incidents ki hain, jo 2014 aur 2016 mein huye the. Pehla incident AirAsia flight par hua tha, aur doosra aur teesra photo Aeroflot airline par huye incident ke hain. Collage ka pehla screenshot 2014 ka incident dikhata hai, jahaan ek Chinese passenger ne Air Asia flight par ek flight attendant par garam paani ka cup feka tha. Baaki ke do images 2016 ka incident dikhate hain jo ki
label: FALSE

claim: SC collegium ne teen transfers recommend kiye the, lekin sirf Justice Muralidhar ki transfer ko notify kiya gaya tha. Haqiqat yeh hai ki SC collegium dwara recommend kiye gaye teenon transfers ko ek hi din arthritis 26 February 2020 ko notify kiya gaya tha. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Union Law Department ne claim kiya hai ki Section 41A of CrPC mein amendment kiya gaya hai aur police station bail ko cancel kar diya gaya hai taaki police department mein corruption ko check kiya ja sake. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Law Ministry ne Section 41A of CrPC mein abhi tak koi recent changes nahi kiye hain. Halanki 2008 & 2010 CrPC amendment acts ko 2015 mein repeal kar diya gaya tha, lekin General Clauses Act (1897) ke hisaab se, amendment act ko repeal karna original act mein kiye gaye changes ko repeal nahi karta hai. Original act mein kiye gaye amendments intact rahte hain, jab tak ki original act ko explicitly repeal ya amend nahi kiya jata hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government ki taraf se free laptops pane ke liye registration link diya ja raha hai, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki yeh link fraud hai. Is link par click karne par user ko ek blog par redirect kiya jata hai, jahan unse personal details maange jate hain. User ko registration poora karne ke liye message ko 10 anya logon ke saath share karna padta hai. Pehle bhi, Press Information Bureau (PIB) ne aise kai fake blogs ka pardehfaash kiya hai jo smartphones, laptops, aur scholarships offer kar rahe the. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Bhagat Singh, Rajguru aur Sukhdev ko 14 February 1931 (Valentine’s Day) ko shaheed kiya gaya tha. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Bhagat Singh, Rajguru aur Sukhdev ko 23 March 1931 ko phasi di gayi thi, Valentine’s Day par nahi. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Asaf Ali, ek Muslim, ne Bhagat Singh ki taraf se argument diya; Rai Bahadur Suryavamsham Sharma, ek RSS member, ne British empire ki taraf se represent kiya aur Bhagat Singh ke liye death sentence ka plea kiya. Sachchai yeh hai ki Bhagat Singh ne do trials ka samna kiya. Pehla trial central assembly bombing case mein tha jismein Bhagat Singh ko umra qaid ki saza di gayi thi. 'Murder of Saunders' case mein Bhagat Singh ko death sentence di gayi thi. Jab Saunders murder case ki baat karte hain, to official judgement documents se spashth hota hai ki Lala Duni Chand ne Bhagat Singh ko apna case ladne ke liye advise kiya, jabki Mr. Noad ne uska case lada.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Delhi Assembly Elections 2020 mein, BJP ne kaha ki 27 seats pe unhone kam se kam 1000 votes ki margin se haar gaye. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Delhi Elections mein sirf do seats aise thi jahan kam se kam 1000 votes ki margin se jeet hui thi. Un do seats mein se ek seat AAP ne jeeti thi aur doosri BJP ne. Isliye, BJP ne sirf ek seat kam se kam 1000 votes ki margin se haar thi. Aur koi bhi seat 100 votes se kam ki margin se nahi jeeti gayi thi. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Bombay High Court ne ek judgement diya tha ki koi bhi Sonia Gandhi ko Antonio Maino bol sakta hai, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Arnab Goswami ke do FIRs ko quash karne ke liye Bombay High Court mein di gayi appeal par judgement 12 June 2020 ko reserve kiya gaya tha. Court ne kaha ki 09 June ko diya gaya interim order final order tak continue karega. Us interim order mein, Bombay High Court ne Sonia Gandhi se related koi bhi statement nahi diya tha, isliye yeh claim POORE se GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Central government ne guidelines jari kiye hai ke agar ration card teen mahine tak use nahi kiya jata hai to wo cancel ho jayega. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki Central government ne aise koi guidelines jari nahi kiye hai ke ration cards agar teen mahine tak use nahi kiye jate hai to wo cancel ho jayenge. PIB ne bhi ek tweet ke madhyam se yehi baat kahi hai aur is news ko fake rating di hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: State Government ne Hyderabad mein flooded logon ko Rs. 10,000 ki relief recently di hai, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki ye paise actually Central Government dwara release kiye gaye Rs. 550 crores flood aid se finance kiye gaye hain. Fact yeh hai ki Central Government ne Rs. 448 crores SDRMF ke apne hisse ke roop mein Telangana ko release kiye hain, jo ki Central Government par ek statutory obligation hai, aur ye fund har state ko disaster ho ya na ho, release karti hai. Lekin is fund ka 2nd instalment sirf kuchh states ko release kiya jata hai, aur Telangana inmein se ek hai. Iske alawa, koi additional assistance release nahi ki gayi hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Jyotiraditya Scindia ne kaha ki petrol par ikattha hue 64% tax state governments ko jata hai, jabki center ke paas sirf 36% rehta hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Central government petrol par Rs. 32.9 liter par excise duty lagati hai, aur is excise duty mein se, Rs. 32.33 paise yaani 98.27% center apne paas rakhta hai, sirf 1.73% sabhi states mein distribute hota hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Chief Justice of India (CJI) DY Chandrachud ne courtroom se achanak bahar nikalne ki baat kahi ja rahi hai jabki Solicitor General of India Tushar Mehta apne arguments five-judge Bench ke saamne, jo ki CJI ke lead mein tha, present kar rahe the. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki poore video mein dekha ja sakta hai ki Chandrachud ne sirf apni chair adjust ki aur Tushar Mehta ka argument sunte rahe, courtroom se bahar nahin gaye. Original video ko 23:00 se 27:05 ke beech edit kiya gaya tha aur phir share kiya gaya. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: PM Modi ne 1098 child helpline announce kiya hai, aisa kahta hai, lekin sach yeh hai ki CHILDLINE ka shuruwat lagbhag do dashak phele TISS mein field action project ke roop mein hua tha. Abhi, CHILDLINE India Foundation (CIF) is helpline ka managing karta hai aur Ministry of Women and Child Development ke Child Protection Services ke tahat funding paata hai. To, pehle se maujud helpline ko PM Modi dwara nayi ghoshna ke roop mein promote kiya ja raha hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Congress President ka approval lena zaruri hai PMNRF se funds use karne ke liye, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sach yeh hai ki aisa koi approval lena zaruri nahi hai. PMNRF website par yeh padh sakte hain ki fund se paise nikalne ka faisla Prime Minister ka discretion hota hai. Pehle, is fund ka management ek committee karta tha (jismein Congress President bhi member tha), lekin 1985 mein, sab powers Prime Minister ko transfer kar di gayi. Isliye, post mein jo claim kiya gaya hai, woh FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: AEFI cases ke liye clean aur structured data download karne ke liye kahan se mil sakta hai, Dataful se clean, standardised, structured, aur ready-to-use detailed data of causality assessment reports of AEFI cases download kiya ja sakta hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Jab government ne April-June 2020 ke GDP figures release kiye, toh social media par kai narratives share ho rahe hain jo India ki rate ko G-7 countries aur China ke economies se compare kar rahe hain, lekin kaun se claims sach hai?
label: MISLEADING

claim: Social media par ek claim hai ki India mein Muslim population 20% hai aur har din 65000 children born hote hain, jinmein se 40000 Muslims hote hain. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Civil Registration System, Office of Registrar General, India ke under birth registrations ka total number record kiya jata hai, lekin ye reports religion-wise registration data provide nahi karte. Iske alawa, 2011 Census ke hisab se India mein Muslim population ka share 14.2% hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Aap India me Custodial Crimes ke Clean & Structured Data ka download kaha se kar sakte hai? Dataful se custodial crimes se related clean, structured, aur ready-to-use datasets download kiye ja sakte hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Pyaz aur potatoes ko saath mein rakhne se potatoes mein poisonous chemicals jaise solanine aur chaconine banne lagte hain, jo consume karne par fatal ho sakte hain, khaskar bachchon ke liye. Sachchai yeh hai ki pyaz ethylene gas release karte hain aur potatoes mein glycoalkaloids jaise solanine aur chaconine hote hain, aur in dono ko saath mein rakhne se sirf spoilage badh jata hai. Lekin toxic effects sirf tab dekhe jaate hain jab bade matra mein green ya sprouted potatoes consume kiye jaate hain. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim Misleading hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Tamil Nadu mein mandiron ke liye electricity charges Rs. 8/unit hai, lekin Masjidon aur Churches ke liye yeh Rs. 2.85/unit hai, aisa ek claim hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki sabhi dharmik sthalon ko same tariff rate di jaati hai. Kayi orders mein yeh dekhne ko milta hai ki Tamil Nadu mein electricity tariff rate mein koi dharmik bhedbhav nahi hai. Iske alawa, Tamil Nadu Electricity officials ne FACTLY ko bataaya hai ki viral message galat hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Social Media par posts bahut shared ho rahe hain jo users ko Chinese products ke bare mein educate kar rahe hain. Kuch posts yeh bhi keh rahe hain ki kisi bhi product ka barcode ka pehla 3-digits humein bata sakta hai ki woh product kaha manufactured hua hai. Yeh raha hai ek detailed explainer jismein aapko barcodes ke bare mein sab kuch pata chalega.
label: FALSE

claim: Union Minister Piyush Goyal ne haal hi me tweet kiya ki 18 years me pehli baar, India ne June 2020 me goods ka trade surplus report kiya aur ye 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' ki taraf ek kadam hai. Kya uske tweet aur data ka interpretation India ke trade ki actual picture dikhata hai? Yahaan ek fact-check hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Finance minister ne 2020-21 ke budget speech mein kayi claims kiye jo reduced corporate tax rate aur medical equipment ki export se related hain, toh hum is series mein in claims ka fact check karenge.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Punjab government ne 2020-21 mein state budget ka 8% hissa education ko allocate kiya, iske baad Congress party ne tweet kiya aur is allocation ko desh ke liye ek misaal bataya, kya education ko aisa allocation pehle kabhi nahi mila hai? Yahaan ek fact-check hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Jaggi Vasudev (Sadhguru) ne haal hi me CAA ke baare me baat ki aur apne talk ke dauraan, unhone CAA se sambandhit muddeon par kai davaon ki. Yahaan unme se kuch davaon ka fact-check kiya gaya hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Union Finance minister ne haal hi me PMFBY ke tahat insured kisanon ki sankhya ke baare me davaayein ki hain. Congress party ne bhi scheme ki haal hi me hue punaruddhaar ke baare me davaayein ki hain. Yahaan dono davaon ka fact-check diya gaya hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Haal hi mein, ek order jari kiya gaya hai jismein NSA ke kuch powers ko Delhi police ko extend kiya gaya hai. Kya yeh ek special order hai? Kya aise orders pehle bhi Delhi ya kisi anya state mein jari kiye gaye hain? Yeh raha detailed fact-check.
label: FALSE

claim: Update (APRIL 01, 2021): COVID-19 pandemic ke karan paa rahi mushkilon ko dekhkar central government ne 31 March 2021 ko ek notification jari kiya hai, jisme Aadhaar number ko PAN ke saath linking ki last date 31 March 2021 se 30 June 2021 tak badhadi gayi hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Government ko kehna hai ki woh logon ko jo smartphones hai unko employment provide karegi. Lekin sach yeh hai ki Central Government ne aisa koi announcement nahi kiya hai. Iske alawa, diya gaya link logon ko kisi private application par redirect karta hai. Social media par bhi aise hi messages share ho rahe hain jo anya dubious website links share kar rahe hain. Press Information Bureau (PIB) ne bhi clarify kiya hai ki yeh message fake hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: NPR document ki zarurat hai 01 April 2020 se bank accounts se paise nikalne ke liye, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Reserve Bank of India ne aisa koi circular jari nahi kiya hai. NPR document Officially Valid Documents (OVD) mein se ek hai, jo KYC verification ke liye jama karna hota hai. Lekin yeh mandatory nahi hai, koi bhi any Officially Valid Document jama kiya ja sakta hai. Isliye post mein jo claim kiya gaya hai woh FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Petrol ke price build-up se pata chalta hai ki Delhi mein Petrol par State Tax, Central Tax se zyada hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki post mein diye gaye various taxes ke amounts sahi nahin hain. Delhi mein State VAT sirf Rs 14.49/Ltr. hai, jabki central government dwara tax ke roop mein ikattha kiya gaya total amount, jo ki per liter petrol par Special Additional Excise, Road & Infrastructure aur Basic Excise Duty shaamil hai, woh Rs. 21.73 hai. Iske alawa, average Dealer Commission Rs 3.54/Ltr. hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Election Commission of India ne kaha ki wo voter turnout ki information religion ke basis par nahi deti, lekin kuch Muslim majority constituencies mein higher voter turnouts record hui hai, iska matlab yeh nahi hai ki 99% Muslim voters ne apne votes cast kiye hain, isliye yeh claim jo post mein kiya gaya hai wo FALSE hai, kyunki 2020 Delhi Elections mein 99% Muslim voters aur 68% Hindu voters ne vote kiye is baat ka koi sachchai nahi hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government ne ek naya bill laya hai - Financial Resolution and Deposit Insurance (FRDI) Bill, 2017, jise ab parliament me pass hone se pehle Joint Parliamentary Committee me bheja gaya hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Government ne 2018 me FRDI Bill, 2017 ko vapas le liya tha, isliye ab parliament me koi aisa bill pending nahi hai. July 2020 me, Government ne spasht kiya ki unhone FRDI Bill ko phir se laye jane ka koi faisla nahi kiya hai. Iske alawa, post me diya gaya article 'The Hindu' ne 2017 me publish kiya tha.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Dataful se hum petrol ki Clean & Structured Data download kar sakte hain, jo ki petrol production, imports, exports, aur state-wise per capita consumption se related hai, wo datasets yaha se download kiye ja sakte hain.
label: FALSE

claim: Global terrorist Syed Salahuddin ne 1987 mein Kashmir se congress party ke ticket par assembly election lada, lekin yeh baat sacchi nahin hai, kyunki Election Commission of India (ECI) ke mutabiq, Mohammed Yusuf Shah (jo Syed Salahuddin ke naam se bhi jaana jaata hai) ne 1987 mein Srinagar ke Amirakadal constituency se independent candidate ke roop mein chunaav lada tha aur haar gaye the, aur is constituency mein Congress party ne chunaav bhi nahin lada tha, isliye yeh claim galat hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government of India ne 5 lakh rupees pension widowed women ko 'PM Vidhva Mahila Samriddhi Yojana' ke tahat dena ka keh diya hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India ke official website par aisi koi scheme nahin mili. Press Information of Bureau (PIB) ne apne tweet ke madhyam se spasht kiya ki Indian Government dwara aisi koi scheme chalayi nahin ja rahi hai jiska naam 'PM Vidhva Mahila Samriddhi Yojana' ho. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government of India ₹ 2000 har ladki ko 'PM Kanya Aashirvad Yojana' ke tehet distribute kar rahi hai, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki aisa koi scheme Government of India ne introduce nahi kiya hai, jo 'PM Kanya Aashirvad Yojana' ke naam se jaana jata hai. Jab social media par aise posts viral hue to Press Information Bureau (PIB) ne bhi iski sacchai clear ki thi, isliye post mein jo dawa kiya gaya hai woh FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Central government ne PM Dhana Lakshmi Yojana/ PM Vaibhav Lakshmi Yojana ka launch kiya hai mahilaon ke fayde ke liye. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki Central Government ne aisi koi yojana launch nahi ki hai. ‘Press Information Bureau (PIB)’ ne ek tweet ke through iski wajood ko sankhyanayank tarike se nakara hai aur kaha hai ki ye post fake hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: IMF ne anumaan lagaya hai ki India mein 2020 mein 1.9% GDP growth hoga, jo 2020 mein major economies mein sabse jyada hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki April 2020 mein IMF dwara release kiye gaye projections ke hisaab se, India ka GDP 1.9% badhega, lekin June 2020 mein IMF dwara release kiye gaye revised estimates ke hisaab se, India mein -4.2% ki negative growth rate dekhne ko milegi. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT aur MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Bharat mein, 2013 mein 1638 se badhkar 2018 mein 3051 rape cases report hui thi, aisa ek claim hai. Lekin National Crime Records Bureau ka report kehta hai ki 2013 mein Bharat mein 33707 rape cases report hui thi, na ki 1638. Aur 2018 ke liye data available nahin hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Bharat ka debt 2014 mein US$ 296 billion se 2018 mein US$ 486 billion tak tezi se badh gaya hai, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki Finance Ministry ke mutabik, 31 March 2014 ko Bharat ka kul outstanding debt US$ 929.6 billion tha, jabki 31 March 2018 ko yeh US$ 1265.7 billion tak pahuch gaya tha. In saalon mein yeh dheere-dheere badhta gaya, jaise ki UPA ke saalon mein hua tha. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Rohingya log 1,769 Km ka safar karke India mein enter karna chahte hain, lekin 2 Km ka safar karke China mein enter nahi karna chahte. Sachai yeh hai ki Myanmar India aur China dono ke saath border share karta hai. Post mein di gayi map North-Eastern India ko ignore karti hai. Iske alawa, Myanmar mein Rohingya log majorly Rakhine State mein concentrate hain, jo ki China se zyada India ke nazdeek hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Pehli baar 72 years mein Indian Rupee Bangladeshi Taka se kamzor hai, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki pichle das saalon mein Indian rupee kabhi bhi Bangladeshi Taka se neeche nahi gaya. 24 July 2020 ko, ek Indian Rupee ka mol 1.13 Taka tha. Isliye, is post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Modi government par ilzaam lagaya ja raha hai ki India ke 89.3 per cent debt-to-GDP ratio ke liye woh jimmedar hai, jo IMF ne project kiya hai. Haqeeqat yeh hai ki India ka 89.3 per cent debt-to-GDP ratio, jo IMF ne 2020 ke liye project kiya hai, usmein Central Government aur State Governments dono ke debts shaamil hain. Isliye, Modi government (Center mein) aur State level ki sarkaren dono hi debt position ke liye zimmedar hain. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim GALAT aur BHRAKHAAD hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Kanpur police ne kaha ki ek tweet ke mutabik, ek anclaimed goat jo akele ghoom rahi thi, use police station le jaaya gaya aur baad mein uske owner ko saump diya gaya. Lekin Anwarganj ke Circle Officer, Saifuddin Beg ne kaha ki goat ke saath aaya aadmi mask na pehne ke kaaran bhag gaya aur goat chhod gaya, isliye unhone goat ko police station le aaye. Haalaanki police ki dono versions alag hain, lekin goat ko mask na pehne ke liye arrest nahi kiya gaya hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Kerala sarkar ne NABARD se COVID-19 se nipatne ke liye Rs 20,000 crore ka loan maanga hai. Sachchai yeh hai ki Kerala Government ne COVID-19 se ladne ke liye Rs 20,000 crore ka financial package announce kiya hai, lekin unhone NABARD se Rs 20,000 crore ka loan nahin maanga hai. Unhone RIDF ke tahat NABARD se Rs 2000 crore ka special line of credit maangi hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Kolkata Police ne spasht kiya ki unhone '1091' aur '7837018555' helpline numbers ke saath aisi koi free ride scheme shuru nahi ki hai. Lekin, unhone kaha ki ve '100' par call karne wale kisi bhi vyakti ki madad karne ke liye taiyaar hain. Post mein diye gaye numbers Ludhiana Police dwara shuru ki gayi free ride scheme se sambandhit hain, jo raat mein shehar mein safar karne wali mahilaon ke liye hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: BJP ne Bihar Assembly Elections - 2020 me EVM tampering ka proof dene wala video banaaya hai. Lekin sach्चai yeh hai ki bas vote share aur jeetey hue seats ka analysis karke EVMs me discrepancies hone ka nishkarsh nahi nikala ja sakta. Bahut saare factors hote hain jo kisi political party ke vote share aur jeetey hue seats ko affect karte hain. BJP ka kam vote share isliye ho sakta hai kyunki unhone 2020 me 2015 ke compared kam seats par chunaav ladaaya, aur BJP ne 2015 ke compared 2020 me zyada 'vote % in seats contested' hone ke kaaran zyada seats jeeti ho sakti hain. RJD ki performance par bhi yahi baat lagu hoti hai, isliye yeh claim galat hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Petrol ki keemat dusre deshon mein bahut kam hai, India ke muqable. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki list mein di gayi keemat aur vastavik keemat mein bahut antar hai. Kuch deshon mein petrol ki keemat per liter India se zyada hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Luc Montagnier ne ek recent interview mein mass vaccinations ke baare mein chinta vyakt ki thi, lekin unhone yeh claim nahi kiya ki 2 years mein sabhi vaccinated log marengay. Iske alawa, vaccination se adhik deaths hone ke liye paryapt scientific data bhi nahi hai. Vaccination se virus ka spread aur mutation rokti hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) ne States ko Schools kholne ki permission nahi di hai
label: FALSE

claim: TRAI Registration document me kaha ja raha hai ki landowner se registration charges liye jaenge mobile tower install karne ke liye. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki ye document fake hai. Pehle bhi, kai baar, TRAI ne spaasht kiya hai ki Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) seedha ya aseedha kisi bhi tarah se, kisi bhi tax / fees ka levy nahi karta hai premises lease karne ke liye mobile towers install karne ke liye ya ‘No Objection Certificates’ jari karne ke liye. Department of Telecommunications (DoT) ne bhi yehi baat spaasht ki hai. Isliye post me kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government of India ne ek naya video conferencing tool – ‘Namaste’ ka beta version launch kiya, aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki ‘Namaste’ website ‘inscripts’ naamak private company dwara power kiya ja raha hai, jo ki Mumbai mein headquartered hai. Isske alawa, Government ne aisa koi tool launch karne se inkaar kiya hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government of India ne 'National Rural Youth Training and Employment Scheme' shuru kiya hai, jiske tahat desh ke padhe likhe rural boys and girls ko naukri dena hai. Lekin sach yeh hai ki aisa koi Government scheme nahi hai, jiska naam National Rural Youth Training and Employment Scheme ho. Iss letter mein grammatical aur spelling ki galtiyaan hai, jo is baat ko darshati hai ki yeh ek suspicious letter hai jo ek fake scheme ka ullekh kar raha hai. Aise hi fake scheme wale letters pehle bhi FACTLY ne expose kiye hain, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: India ko apna naam British ne diya, Independence ke baad, aur iska full form hai 'Independent Nation Declared In August', aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki India ka naam Indus se aaya hai, jo Sanskrit mein Sindhu kehte hain; 2500 years ago Iranians aur Greeks northwest se aaye the aur unhein Indus ki jaankari thi, toh unhone use Hindos ya Indos kaha, aur nadi ke poorvi taraf ka zona India kehte the. British ne 18th century se 'India' ka term istemaal kiya tha, Independence ke baad nahi, aur 19th aur 20th century mein British Parliament ne kai legislations banayi thi, jo Independence se pehle thi.
label: FALSE

claim: Ek WhatsApp message chal rahi hai, jismein claim kiya ja raha hai ki jo workers 1990-2020 ke beech kaam karte the, unhein Labour Ministry ki taraf se Rs 120000 milenge. Lekin PIB Fact Check ne kaha ki yeh #FakeNews hai, Govt. of India ne aisi koi announcement nahi ki hai, isliye aise fraudulent websites se savdhan rahein.
label: FALSE

claim: NIC ka Memorandum Google aur Apple stores se Chinese Apps ko ban karne wala hai, lekin yeh completely fake hai.
label: FALSE

claim: RBI ne saal ki closing 30 June 2020 tak badhadi, lekin sach yeh hai ki Bharat mein normal financial year, jo government aur anya sansthaon dwara taxation purpose ke liye follow kiya jata hai, woh 01 April se 31 March tak hota hai. RBI ka accounting/financial year 1 July se 30 June tak hota hai, isme koi badlaav nahi hua hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Court ne helmet ke upyog ki jaanch ko reject kar diya hai. Ab 15 kms ke andar municipal corporation ke andar helmet pehnna mandatory nahi hai. Sachchai yeh hai ki PIB ne ek tweet ke through confirm kiya hai ki court ne helmet pehnne ki rule ko relax karne wali news fake hai. Unka tweet is baat ko spasht taur par kehta hai ki drivers ko ab bhi helmet pehnna zaroori hai. Humne koi aisa court judgment nahi paya jo helmet pehnne ki rule ko relax karta ho. Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act 2019 meh is baat ka kahi nahi gaya hai ki municipal corporation ke limits ke andar helmet ka upyog exempt hai. Isliye yeh claim jo kiya gaya hai
label: FALSE

claim: Government ki treasury se ₹1.28 lakh crore ka gold gayab ho gaya hai. Sachchai yeh hai ki RBI ke data ke hisaab se gold reserves ki value kam ho gayi hai, lekin koi physical gold gayab nahi hua hai. PIB Fact Check ne bhi spasht kiya hai ki yeh claim galat hai aur gold ki value mein giravat price fluctuations ke kaaran hai, gold ki kami nahi. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Indian Railways ne kaha ki unke dwara 'Convenience fee' refund nahi kiya jata hai, jo ki IRCTC website par Railways e-tickets book karte waqt charge kiya jata hai, isliye yeh claim jo post mein kiya gaya hai woh MISLEADING hai, kyunki Indian Railways har cancelled ticket par lagbhag 20 rupees ka deduction nahi karta.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Haal hi mein, politicians ki pensions ke regarding ek petition Supreme Court mein file kiya gaya hai. Sachchai yeh hai ki Supreme Court ne pehle bhi is mamle par ek PIL dismiss kiya tha, jisme MPs ke salaries, pensions aur anya perks ki legality ko sahi tha. 2022 mein, Madhya Pradesh High Court ne bhi isi mamle par ek PIL dismiss kiya tha. Tab se ab tak, politicians ke salaries ya pensions ke baare mein aisi koi petition file hone ki khabar nahin aayi hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Union government ne decide kiya hai ki Bangalore mein Supreme Court ka ek permanent bench establish kiya jayega. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Union Government ne aise kisi proposal ko approve nahi kiya hai jo Bangalore mein SC bench establish karne ki maang karta hai. Ek sawal ka jawab dete hue, jismein desh ke char hisson mein court of appeal establish karne ke baare mein jaankari maangi gayi thi, Union Law minister ne 2016 ka ek Writ Petition ka zikr karte hue kaha ki yeh maamla Supreme Court mein sub-judice hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Narendra Modi government ne claim kiya hai ki unhone Telangana mein pichhle 3 saalon mein 9 medical colleges sthapit kiye hain, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Central government ne kabhi bhi Telangana mein koi medical college sthapit nahi kiya hai, jabse centrally sponsored scheme shuru hua hai. MCI ki recognition ko 9 medical colleges ko Telangana mein central government dwara sthapit karne ki jaankari galat tarike se present ki gayi hai, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Congress sarkar (2004-14) ke dauraan, Supreme Court judges se lekar university vice-chancellors aur Indian ambassadors tak, alag-alag departments mein padon ko Muslims aur Christians se bhara gaya hai, jabki in padon mein Hinduon ki sankhya bahut kam hai, aur yeh Muslim-Christian reservation ke kaaran hai. Haqiqat: Supreme Court of India aur Department of Personnel & Training ke mutabiq, Supreme Court judges aur IAS officers ke roop mein Hinduon ki nayukti ki sankhya Muslims aur Christians ke muqable bahut zyada hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Government ko lagta hai ki Rs. 2600 crores ka nuksan ho raha hai kyunki scribbled notes ko new notes se replace karna padta hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki RBI, agar poori matra mein soiled notes ko replace bhi kare, to bhi demonetization ke baad ke saal ko chhodkar, soiled notes ko print karne ka kharcha Rs. 2700 crores ke aaspaas tha. Isse bhi yeh pata chalta hai ki scribbled notes ko print karne ka kharcha kaafi kam hoga, kyunki scribbled notes sirf soiled notes ka ek hissa hain. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Nahin, lockdown ko 03 June 2020 tak Telangana mein extend nahi kiya gaya hai.
label: FALSE

claim: 1917 mein, ek rupee ka value $13 USD ka tha, jabki 2014 mein $1 USD ka value Rs. 63 ka tha, lekin yeh fact hai ki USD 1917 mein Indian Rupee ke compare mein weaker nahin tha. RBI ke anusar, 1917 mein ek rupee ka value 0.314 USD ka tha, isliye yeh claim jo post mein kiya gaya hai, wo FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Bharatiya sarkar ne kaha ki India pehli baar United Nations Security Council ka presidency sambhal lega. Sachchai yeh hai ki United Nations ke niyam ke mutabik, UNSC ke har member ko president banne ka mauka milta hai aur har member country ek mahine ke liye alphabetical order mein presidency sambhalta hai. India pehle seven baar UN security council ke non-permanent member chuna gaya tha aur is dauraan presidency ki zimmedari nibhai thi. PM Modi 09 August 2021 ko virtual mode mein UNSC ka ek open Debate chair karenge. Yeh pehli baar hoga jab koi Indian Prime Minister is tarah ka debate chair karenge.
label: MISLEADING

claim: UPA government ne 2012 mein new Parliament building ka project shuru kiya tha, jiska cost Rs. 3000 crores tha. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki former Lok Sabha Speaker Meira Kumar ne proposal ko approve kiya tha, lekin is project ke cost aur funds allocate karne ki baat tak nahin pahunchi. Rs. 3000 crores ka amount, jo ki new Parliament building ka purported cost hai, UPA regime ke dauraan estimate kiya gaya tha, woh ek fictitious number hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Venkaiah Naidu, Rajya Sabha ke Vice Chairman, ne Parliament mein ek bill ke forceful passage ke baad roye, jismein LIC ko bechna shamil tha. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki 12 August 2021 ko, Vice President Venkaiah Naidu ne ek session ke dauran apni ubaal ko vyakt kiya aur previous day ke opposition MPs ke protest ke kaaran aansoo bahaye. Is breakdown ka koi lena-dena nahi hai government ke LIC mein stake bechne se, jo pehle March mein Finance Act, 2021 ke through ho chuka tha. Jabki 12 August 2021 ko Rajya Sabha ne "The General Insurance Business (Nationalisation) Amendment Bill, 2021" pass kiya, jo ki allow karta hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: U.S. ko Japan mein koi item bechna allowed nahi hai kyunki unhone 1945 mein country par nuclear bomb feka tha. Lekin, fact yeh hai ki Japan 2019 mein U.S. ka fourth largest export market tha. 'Office of the United States Trade Representative' website par yeh padh sakte hain ki U.S. ne Japan ko 2019 mein US$ 74.7 billion goods export kiye. Isliye, yeh claim jo kiya gaya hai woh FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: BJP ne Gujarat aur Himachal elections EVM's hack karke jeeti hai, yeh claim former CEC Krishnamurthy ke naam par thi. Lekin Election Commission of India ne ek circular jari kiya hai ki former CEC Krishnamurthy ne is claim ko 2017 mein news viral hone ke baad deny kiya tha. Is circular mein yeh bhi kaha gaya hai ki former CEC ne phir se yeh baat kahii hai ki unke naam par diya gaya statement galat hai. Circular ke mutabiq, is fake news ko phailane ke sambandh mein ek FIR darj kiya gaya hai aur jaanch bhi shuru ho gayi hai. Isliye, post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: BJP ne 2022 UP assembly elections mein 86 seats jeeti hai, jo ki winning margin less than 2000 votes thi, aisa dava kiya ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki ECI dwara release kiye gaye data ke anusaar, Uttar Pradesh mein sirf 29 seats hain jahan winning margin less than 2000 votes thi. In 29 seats mein se, 11 seats ka winning margin less than 500 votes hai, 4 seats ka 500 – 1000 votes ke beech mein hai, aur 14 seats ka 1000-2000 votes ke beech mein hai. Aur, ek bhi seat nahi hai jahan winning margin 200 votes se kam ho. Isliye, is post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: India mein accidental deaths ke related clean aur structured data download karne ke liye kahan se mil sakta hai? Dataful par clean, standardised, aur ready-to-use detailed data on accidental deaths uplabdh hai. Is collection mein year-, state-, city-, age-, aur gender-wise data accidental deaths ke causes, jaise ki place of occurrence, number of cases, injuries, deaths, aur rates ke baare mein uplabdh hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Central Government ne kaha ki China se MBBS degree lena India mein valid nahi hai. Lekin fact yeh hai ki Central government ne aisa koi statement nahi diya. Jo bhi vyakti MBBS ya koi anya equivalent course duniya ke kisi bhi hisse mein (China samet) karta hai, usko India mein medical practice shuru karne ke liye ‘Foreign Medical Graduates Exam’ pass karna padta hai. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim FALSE hai.
label: FALSE

claim: President's rule kabhi Narendra Modi ke PM ke tenure mein nahi lagaya gaya, jabki Indira Gandhi ke PM ke tenure mein 39 baar yeh lagaya gaya tha. Sachchai yeh hai ki Parliament library aur RTI ke through milne wali jaankari ke mutabiq, President's rule Narendra Modi ke Prime Ministerial stint ke dauraan bhi lagaya gaya tha, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Rabindranath Tagore ne 'Jana Gana Mana' song likha tha King George V ki praise mein, jo Nobel Prize selection committee ke Chairman the jab Rabindranath Tagore ko 1913 mein Nobel Prize mila tha. Lekin, 1911 Congress Session ke dauran, usi din do songs perform hui thi, jinmein se ek Rabindranath Tagore ka 'Jana Gana Mana' tha aur doosri Ramanuja Chaudhary ki composition thi, jo especially King George V ke liye perform hui thi. Lekin, kuch English media reports ne galat bataya ki Tagore ka song King George V ke honour mein gaya tha. Rabindranath Tagore ne apne letters mein likha tha ki
label: FALSE

claim: Iske liye clean aur structured data kahan se download kar sakte hain? Dataful par aapko year aur country-wise racial attacks on Indians abroad ka clean, structured, aur ready-to-use detailed dataset mil jayega. Dataful par aur bhi kuch datasets available hain, jaise Overseas Citizens of India, Indians living abroad jo mare gaye, United States me hate crimes, aur related topics par.
label: FALSE

claim: Ashok Gehlot ne claim kiya hai ki unhone Rs. 100 crores allocate kiye hain Dargah ke development ke liye, lekin sachchai yeh hai ki Rajasthan government ne 2021-22 budget mein Rs. 100 crores allocate kiye the ek religious circuit develop karne ke liye, jismein Sikh, Jain, Hindu, aur Muslimon ke worship places ko connect kiya jaaye, 'Sarva Dharma Sama Bhava' ko badhava dena, isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Mukesh Ambani ki dhanrashi 10 lakh crore hai (2019), aisa kaha ja raha hai. Lekin sachchai yeh hai ki 'Forbes' ke mutabiq, Mukesh Ambani ki net worth aaj ke samay around 4.3 lakh crore hai. Mukesh Ambani ki Reliance Industries Limited ki market capitalization November mein 10 lakh crore tak pahunchi thi, unki dhanrashi nahi. Isliye post mein kiya gaya claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Is edition of Court Judgements review mein, hum Supreme Court ke judgement ko OBC Creamy layer status par dekhege, aur sath hi Railway Travel Insurance par bhi, Karnataka High Court ka order Child Sexual Abuse Material ka possession par, Andhra Pradesh High Court ka order Compassionate Appointment higher posts par, aur Delhi High Court ka judgement electoral disqualification period mein reduction par, jo ki good conduct post-conviction par based hai.
label: FALSE

claim: Ritu Raj Choudhary, IIT Manipur ka ek second-year student, ne Google ko 52 seconds ke liye hack kiya tha; uske capabilities ko appreciate karte hue Google ne use 3.66 crores package ke saath joining letter diya. Lekin sachai yeh hai ki Ritu Raj Choudhary ne Google ko hack nahi kiya, usne sirf ek bug report kiya tha. Usne apne LinkedIn account ke through clarify kiya ki usse Google se koi job offer nahi mili, aur usne viral message ko 'fake news' kahte hue claim ko FALSE kar diya.
label: FALSE

claim: UP government ne 2017 tak 172 celebrities ko Rs 50000 monthly diya tha, kyunki unhe laga ki ve Akhilesh government ko media aur social media par positive coverage denge. Lekin fact ye hai ki ye 172 log 'Yash Bharati Samman' se nawaze hue the, aur unhe isliye pension mil rahi thi, media aur social media par positive coverage ke liye nahi. Sabhi Bollywood celebrities nahi the, balki unme alag alag fields jaise art, literature, films, science, etc ke eminent personalities bhi shaamil the. Aur CM Yogi ne pensions ko completely band nahi kiya hai, isliye ye claim galat hai.
label: MISLEADING

claim: Supreme Court ne 2015 mein Section 66A of IT Act, 2000 ko strike down kar diya tha, lekin abhi bhi social media par specific content post karne ke liye kai anya laws ke tahat kisi bhi vyakti ko arrest kiya ja sakta hai, isliye social media par posts ke liye vyakti jimmedar hai aur arrest bhi ho sakta hai, isliye yeh claim MISLEADING hai.
label: MISLEADING
